title: Agroforestry Task Force and Living Center
summary: Greenpill Brasil's 2024 agroforestry and living-center work, sourced from the public Greenpill Year in Review.
description: The public 2024 Year in Review names Greenpill Brasil's agroforestry task force and community living-center work as a concrete chapter effort. Keep this initiative qualitative until a chapter-owned follow-up source adds precise completion, attendance, food-sovereignty, or biodiversity metrics.
